Tests the conversion of NaN to a string using the String constructor.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `String` function when it is used with the `NaN` value. The test verifies that converting `NaN` to a string results in the string "NaN". This is a narrow functionality test, focusing specifically on the conversion of the `NaN` value to a string representation in JavaScript. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is intended to validate expected behavior, likely as part of a larger suite of tests.
